shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "setCustomValidity|reportValidity|shouldUseNativeValidation" src | head -200 && rg -n "validateField" src/logic src | head -100'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"export type Field|interface Field\" src/types && sed -n '1,90p' src/types/fields.ts 2>/dev/null || true && sed -n '90,135p' src/logic/validateField.ts && sed -n '270,295p' src/logic/validateField.ts && rg -n \"refs: \\[|refs\\?:|type: 'radio'|type: 'checkbox'\" src/__tests__/logic/validateField.test.tsx | head -60"
/bin/bash -lc "node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(JSON.stringify(p.scripts,null,2))\" && git diff -- src/logic/validateField.ts && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff --stat && git diff -- src/logic/validateField.ts'
